title: REI+
description: Adds a calculator and search history inside of REI's search bar.
body:
# REI+
REI+ or REI Plus adds a lightweight calculator and quality-of-life tools directly to the search bar.
You can type math expressions while searching and instantly see the result without opening a calculator. The mod was meant for Hypixel Skyblock but it can be used outside of that aswell.

## Features
### Search Bar Calculations

Type math expressions directly into the search bar:

![Showcase of the mod calculating 5*125](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c63a7b36920201933ef42c919d56e7c0c744988b.gif)

Pressing Enter commits the result into the search bar:

![Showcase of pressing enter to set the current input to the result.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1baed9174e9c4b7180bfba55699ac07c835cd5ef.gif)

Supported syntax includes:

Standard operators: ```+ - * / ^```
Parentheses: ```(``` and ```)```

Numeric suffixes:
- k = thousand
- m = million
- b = billion
- s = stacks

![Showcase of syntax usage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da9ac1860366bc35b0e059e04e9a3736c726123e.gif)

### Search History

REI+ keeps track of your previous searches:

![Showcase of the mod history function](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f670d0749c0ee0443fa7f67d85202e7e0468db.gif)

Use ↑ / ↓ arrow keys to cycle through earlier searches, similar to a terminal.


### Configurable Settings

REI+ includes a built-in config screen that lets you customize how it behaves.

You can open it through:
- /reiplus
- Mod Menu
- the REI settings addon button

Available settings include:
- Toggle math calculations on/off
- Toggle the inline preview
- Change preview colours (separator and result)
- Enable/disable auto-calculate while typing
- Adjust the search history buffer size

![Showcase of differently coloured search bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/982e5cfda7df29f4dc802a1ee271a164d2c8ae96.png)
